C3/0000 80 0D       BRA $000F

C3/0002 08          PHP
C3/0003 8B          PHB
C3/0004 0B          PHD
C3/0005 20 3D 00    JSR $003D
C3/0008 20 53 00    JSR $0053
C3/000B 2B          PLD
C3/000C AB          PLB
C3/000D 28          PLP
C3/000E 6B          RTL

C3/000F 48          PHA
C3/0010 20 3D 00    JSR $003D
C3/0013 78          SEI                     A:04FF X:0000 Y:0000 P:eNvMxdIzc
C3/0014 A9 80       LDA #$80                A:04FF X:0000 Y:0000 P:eNvMxdIzc
